assignments.name: user_query
assignments.value: How does the partnership interview at Meta work, and do I need technical examples for it?

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO rag_transactions (
  discord_message_id,
  channel_id,
  channel_name,
  author_id_hash,
  incoming_message_ts,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  user_query
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.discord_message_id }}',
  '{{ $json.channel_id }}',
  '{{ $json.channel_name }}',
  '{{ $json.author_id_hash }}',
  now(),
  'active_call',
  'created',
  'not_started',
  'not_started',
  '{{ $json.user_query }}'
)
RETURNING
  transaction_id,
  created_at,
  discord_message_id,
  channel_id,
  channel_name,
  author_id_hash,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  user_query;

UPDATE rag_transactions
SET
  status = 'retrieving',
  retrieval_status = 'not_started',
  normalized_query = '{{ $json.normalized_query }}',
  query_hash = '{{ $json.query_hash }}'
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $json.transaction_id }}'
RETURNING transaction_id;

UPDATE rag_transactions
SET
  status = '{{ $json.final_status }}',
  retrieval_status = '{{ $json.retrieval_status }}',
  response_status = '{{ $json.response_status }}',
  discord_response_message_id = NULLIF('{{ $json.discord_response_message_id }}', ''),
  refusal_reason = NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $json.refusal_reason }}', ''), 'null'),
  failure_reason = NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $json.failure_reason }}', ''), 'null'),
  completed_at = now(),
  latency_ms = GREATEST(1, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - created_at))::int * 1000)
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $json.transaction_id }}'
RETURNING transaction_id, status, retrieval_status, response_status, refusal_reason, failure_reason, discord_response_message_id, latency_ms;

SELECT
  transaction_id,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  refusal_reason,
  failure_reason,
  discord_response_message_id,
  user_query,
  normalized_query,
  query_hash,
  created_at,
  completed_at,
  latency_ms
FROM rag_transactions
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $items("Build Phoenix Final Checkpoint")[0].json.transaction_id }}';

meta.description: Phase 8 intake/routing workflow. Owns request mode, transaction setup, calls shared RAG core, and routes mode-specific outputs.
